coreBehavior: Warm overpreparedness: Otis anticipates the user's next need one beat early, then turns that tiny timing mismatch into warmth rather than a joke.

expressionIntensityScale.2: visible warmth with slight comic timing
expressionIntensityScale.3: upper safe limit for this lane
expressionIntensityScale.4: too broad for Tower premium tone

globalGuards: Comedy must never reduce Otis's competence.
The user must read safety and warmth before humor.
No expression should rely on costume novelty, prop clutter, or childish exaggeration.
Keep slight belly, natural skin texture, tired kind eyes, asymmetry, and relaxed shoulders visible across all applicable sprites.

expressions.face: Closed-mouth half-smile, soft eyes, one brow barely lifted, smile lines visible.
expressions.body: Relaxed stance, slight belly visible, hands calm and useful.
expressions.promptAddendum: Otis looks as if he opened the elevator exactly before the user asked, amused only by the timing.
expressions.antiPrompt: No wink, no big grin, no host-show pose, no toy mascot face.

expressions.face: Attentive eyes, tiny knowing brow lift, mouth neutral with one soft corner.
expressions.body: Head tilted slightly, one hand near lapel or chest, the other relaxed.
expressions.promptAddendum: Otis seems to have predicted the user's destination but waits with complete patience.
expressions.antiPrompt: No sarcasm, no suspicion, no raised-finger lecture, no detective caricature.

expressions.face: Gently knit brows, eyes kind, tiny self-aware smile under the moustache.
expressions.body: Natural fingers touching beard edge, shoulders uneven but relaxed, weight shifted.
expressions.promptAddendum: Otis has just corrected an overprepared assumption before saying the useful thing.
expressions.antiPrompt: No wizard thinking pose, no exaggerated confusion, no finger fused into beard.

expressions.face: Concerned but warm, eyes steady, mouth calm with a trace of amused reassurance.
expressions.body: One hand raised in a low wait gesture, torso steady, feet planted.
expressions.promptAddendum: Otis gently pauses the user because he has seen this lobby problem before.
expressions.antiPrompt: No panic, no scolding, no guard caricature, no slapstick stop gesture.

expressions.face: Focused eyes, faint private smile, human tiredness still visible.
expressions.body: Slim ledger at waist height, both hands visible, belly not hidden.
expressions.promptAddendum: Otis's ledger seems to already contain the answer, but he remains humble and helpful.
expressions.antiPrompt: No accountant cliche, no oversized book, no prop covering the torso, no office mascot.

expressions.face: Mouth slightly open, smile lines active, eyes gentle and direct.
expressions.body: Small hand arc near chest level, body stable, shoulders relaxed.
expressions.promptAddendum: Otis is explaining a tiny complication with the patience of someone who already prepared the workaround.
expressions.antiPrompt: No lecturer pose, no giant gesture, no salesman grin, no comic open mouth.

poseStateMapping.microBehavior: Hands loosely folded over slight belly, calm face that suggests he is already ready.
Open hand paused one beat early, warm eye contact, no theatrical sweep.
Knowing brow and patient head tilt without smugness.
Natural beard touch and tiny smile as he corrects his assumption.
Small helpful hand arc, explaining the workaround instead of performing.
Low wait gesture, protective calm, amused reassurance.
Slim ledger held low, private smile that reads prepared rather than smug.
